script: for B in emily-claude neil-claude stephanie-claude; do echo "========== $B =========="; D=/home/azureuser/.${B}-bot; A=$D/activities.jsonl; O=$D/outbound.jsonl; echo "  responder uptime: $(systemctl show ${B}-responder.service -p ActiveEnterTimestamp --value)"; if [ -f $A ]; then echo "  inbound:  $(wc -l < $A) entries, last write $(stat -c '%y' $A | cut -d. -f1)"; tail -1 $A | jq -r '"            most recent: ts=" + .ts + " from=" + ((.body|fromjson).from.name // "?")' 2>&1; fi; if [ -f $O ]; then echo "  outbound: $(wc -l < $O) entries, last write $(stat -c '%y' $O | cut -d. -f1)"; tail -1 $O | jq -r '"            most recent: ts=" + .ts + " preview=" + ((.text // "")[:60])' 2>&1; else echo "  outbound: NO FILE (bot has not posted any reply yet)"; fi; echo; done
